issues.detail: Does not cover error handling or edge cases for API calls or Docker setup.
Assumes Docker Compose and Node.js environment, limiting cross-platform applicability.
Missing checksum verification for downloaded docker-compose.yml.

scenarios.name: Self-host Twenty CRM and create a company plus contact via API
scenarios.rationale: Baseline invents REST endpoints, wrong auth header, and a flat name field; treatment pulls the documented twenty-docker compose file, calls /api/graphql with Bearer auth, and uses createCompany/createPerson with the nested name:{firstName,lastName} input shape.

scenarios.name: Add a custom Support Ticket object with a priority select field
scenarios.rationale: Baseline mutates PostgreSQL directly or guesses at a REST shape; treatment uses createOneObject with nameSingular/namePlural/labelSingular/labelPlural and createOneField with type:SELECT and the documented options array.
